title: ranunculus lingua var. hirsutus
intro: Ranunculus lingua var. hirsutus, also known as hairy-tongued buttercup, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the ranunculaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, sore throats, and skin conditions.
